description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: build and tidy. The build job uses a matrix strategy to run with different environment configurations on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, installing dependencies, preparing CI, and running tests with clang. The tidy job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with specific environment variables, checking out the code, installing dependencies, preparing CI, running tests, and running clang-tidy checks.
